query:
UPDATE event_reports SET
                status = COALESCE($2, status),
                score = COALESCE($3, score),
                resolved_by = COALESCE($4, resolved_by),
                resolution_reason = COALESCE($5, resolution_reason),
                resolved_at = COALESCE($6, resolved_at)
            WHERE id = $1
            RETURNING
                id AS "id!",
                event_id AS "event_id!",
                room_id AS "room_id!",
                reporter_user_id AS "reporter_user_id!",
                reported_user_id AS "reported_user_id?",
                event_json AS "event_json?",
                reason AS "reason?",
                description AS "description?",
                status AS "status!",
                score AS "score!",
                received_ts AS "received_ts!",
                resolved_at AS "resolved_ts?",
                resolved_by AS "resolved_by?",
                resolution_reason AS "resolution_reason?"
